utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified per requirement: each item needs the coverage type plus costs. 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with costs and a total; costs present for each sub-item and total. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with costs and a total; base and add-on costs and total present. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with costs and a total; multiple components with costs and total present. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services with costs and total; present. 5) total_budget: includes complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; includes monthly, annual, previous, savings, and start date. All items appear and include costs; they are fully specified according to the stated format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract the items named in the final coverage plan and match them to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, InsurePlus Standard Coverage for property, Enhanced Property Add-on with Smart Home Integration (maps to Smart Home Integration under property_enhancement_services, rating 8), LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel, Business Travel Support, 24/7 Travel Assistance, and Premium Insurance Membership. For each, retrieve the corresponding rating number from the ground-truth.
